subject: Re: Quick question, Lander
original:
De Cronos Groep has scaled from Kontich to five continents, serving ~5,000
customers and backing 600+ companies.

I'm Alban at Cronos. Curious how you decide which new technology
initiatives (or early-stage investments) are worth prioritizing across such
a broad portfolio.

Would it be crazy to compare notes for 10 minutes to see if there's a fit
for a lightweight collaboration?

subject: Re: Helping ALDI Belgium stay lean at 440+ stores
Re: Think, Build and Care.. I guess
original:
Hi Alana,

Seeing how icapps embodies the "Think, Build and Care" motto to deliver
custom software-like the mobile app for Belgium's largest bank-really stood
out to me.

At Cronos, we collaborate with leading digital agencies to support
scalable tech and development projects.

Would you be open to a brief chat to see if we could be a valuable partner
for your team?

Best,
Alban

original:
Sander,

Since icapps leads such impressive end-to-end digital solutions-like the
mobile app for Belgium's largest bank-I wanted to bubble my previous email
to the top of your inbox.

I know you are busy living up to your "Think, Build and Care" motto, so
absolutely no pressure. I just wanted to see if exploring a collaboration
with Cronos aligns with your future custom software projects.

Would you be open to a brief chat?

Best,
Alban

subject: Re: Closing the loop
original:
Hi Maarten,

Developing a mobile app for Belgium's largest bank proves the massive
scale of digital transformation icapps can deliver.

Since we haven't connected, this will be my final email. I don't want to
clutter your inbox if exploring a partnership with Cronos isn't a priority
right now.

I'll gladly leave the door open in case you ever need an extra hand
executing your "Think, Build and Care" philosophy.

Would it make sense to reconnect in a few months?

Best,
Alban

subject: Re: The "Think, Build and Care" approach
original:
Hi Sander,

Loved seeing how icapps brings the "Think, Build and Care" motto to life,
especially with standout projects like your mobile app for Belgium's
largest bank.

I'm gently floating my previous note to the top of your inbox. Since
you're actively building and scaling end-to-end digital solutions, I
thought it might still be relevant to your team.

Absolutely no pressure if your plate is full with client projects right
now.

Would you be open to taking a quick look when things slow down?

Best,
Alban
